Dear [Customer Name],

**Please click the link below to confirm your account:**  
[Secure Link to Verification Page]  

If you did not request this verification, please contact our customer support team immediately at [Support Phone Number] or reply to this email.  

Your account will be temporarily suspended if verification is not completed within 7 days.  

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.  
Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Title]  
[Bank Name]  
[Contact Information]  

---

If you're concerned about phishing, I recommend taking the following steps to protect yourself and others:

1. **Be cautious with unsolicited emails**: Legitimate banks and financial institutions will never ask for your personal or account information via email.
2. **Verify the sender's email address**: Check if the email address matches the official domain of the institution (e.g., @bankofamerica.com, not @bankofamerica-support.com or similar).
3. **Avoid clicking on suspicious links**: Hover over links to see where they lead before clicking. Always go to the official website directly by typing the URL into your browser.
4. **Report phishing attempts**: If you receive a phishing email, report it to the organization it claims to represent and to cybersecurity authorities like the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) in the U.S. or similar agencies in other countries.
